de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy

Class CutHeapObjectsTermGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.CutHeapObjectsTermGenerator
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TermGenerator

    public class CutHeapObjectsTermGenerator
extends Object
implements TermGenerator
    This TermGenerator is used by the SymbolicExecutionStrategy to add early alias checks of used objects as target of store operations on heaps. To achieve this, this TermGenerator generates equality Terms for each possible combination of objects.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Method Detail

      • generate

        public Iterator<Term> generate(RuleApp app,
                      PosInOccurrence pos,

        Specified by:
        generate in interface TermGenerator

      • collectEqualityTerms

        protected void collectEqualityTerms(SequentFormula sf,
                        Set<Term> equalityTerms,
                        Set<Term> topTerms,
                        HeapLDT heapLDT,
                        Services services)
        Computes all possible equality terms between objects in the given SequentFormula.
        Parameters:
        sf - The SequentFormula to work with.
        equalityTerms - The result Set with the equality Terms to fill.
        topTerms - The terms of all sequent formulas
        heapLDT - The HeapLDT to use.
        services - TODO

      • collectStoreLocations

        protected void collectStoreLocations(Term term,
                         Set<Term> storeLocations,
                         HeapLDT heapLDT)
        Collects recursive all possible targets of store operations on a heap.
        Parameters:
        term - The Term to start search in.
        storeLocations - The result Set to fill.
        heapLDT - The HeapLDT to use (it provides the store and create Function).
